message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #333333
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  DatabaseBorderColor #333333
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
}

actor client
participant gateway
participant "developer-service" as devsvc
database "devs-db" as devsdb
participant broker
participant "planning-service" as plansvc
database "planning-db" as plandb

client -> gateway : POST dev
activate gateway
gateway -> devsvc : POST dev
activate devsvc
devsvc -> devsdb : persist
devsvc --> gateway : response 201
deactivate devsvc
gateway --> client : 201
deactivate gateway

devsvc -> broker : emit DevCreated Event

broker -> plansvc : consume Event
activate plansvc
plansvc -> plandb : persist Dev
deactivate plansvc
@enduml
```
